summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 and REQ-2. The 'Licensed & Insured' badge/highlight card was removed from About.tsx, the 'Licensed & Insured Professionals' badge was removed from Hero.tsx (per file summary), and the 'Licensed', 'Bonded', 'Insured' trust badges were removed from About.tsx. The text 'Fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind' does not appear in any of the modified files. Navigation.tsx file summary confirms the nav bar changes were made. No unrelated content appears to have been modified beyond the specified removals.
